message:
*🕉️ Daily Karma Story*

_A farmer once found a wounded eagle and nursed it back to health. Months later, as the farmer sat beneath a crumbling old wall, the eagle swooped down and snatched his turban right off his head. Furious, the farmer chased the bird — and just as he ran from the wall, it collapsed behind him._

_The eagle dropped the turban and flew away. The farmer stood in silence, realizing the bird had just saved his life — repaying the kindness he had once shown._

✨ *How people treat you is their karma; how you react is yours.* — Wayne Dyer

🌱 _Every act of kindness plants a seed. You may not see it grow today, but the universe keeps perfect accounts. Trust the cycle — what you give, returns._

_Be kind. Be patient. Let karma do the rest._ 🙏
